summary: Comprehensive testing of Spotify Artist Dashboard after code review fixes. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows tested successfully. Code review fixes verified: sessionStorage auth, extracted hooks, decomposed seed functions, secrets module, error logging.
critical_code_review_comments: All code review fixes verified and working correctly
sessionStorage used instead of localStorage - confirmed via browser test
Custom hooks (useArtistData, useFanData, useAdminData) properly extracted with useCallback
Error logging added to all empty catch blocks with console.error
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds admin, artist, and fan users on startup. Artist has demo songs with various statuses.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly after code review fixes. Code review changes verified: sessionStorage auth (not localStorage), extracted custom hooks with useCallback, decomposed seed functions, secrets module for random, error logging in catch blocks. Backend uses FastAPI with MongoDB. Frontend uses React with framer-motion animations.

code_review_fixes_verified.sessionStorage_instead_of_localStorage: VERIFIED - Browser test confirmed tokens stored in sessionStorage only
code_review_fixes_verified.extracted_custom_hooks: VERIFIED - useArtistData, useFanData, useAdminData all use useCallback
code_review_fixes_verified.secrets_module: VERIFIED - secrets.randbelow used in server.py lines 147, 394
code_review_fixes_verified.error_logging: VERIFIED - console.error in all catch blocks in hooks and AuthContext

features_tested.artist_dashboard_stats: PASS - Stats cards, chart, songs table displayed
features_tested.upload_song_modal: PASS - Modal opens, form submits, song appears in list
features_tested.fan_browse: PASS - Shows published songs, play/like buttons work
features_tested.admin_panel: PASS - Shows pending songs with approve/reject, unverified artists with verify
features_tested.logout: PASS - Clears sessionStorage and redirects to login
features_tested.register_page: PASS - Creates new accounts, role selection works
